custom_metadata.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs associated with the object.

etag.description:
The entity tag for the object. In JSON list/get responses this is the raw
hex digest (without surrounding quotes). The HTTP `ETag` response header on
Get Object follows RFC 7232 and IS wrapped in surrounding double-quotes.

last_modified.description: The date and time the object was last modified.

size.description: The size of the object in bytes.

ssec.description: Whether the object is encrypted with a customer-supplied encryption key.
